description: A portfolio manager wants to evaluate different hedging strategies for a wind farm to mitigate price volatility.

nodes.task_description: Model the wind farm's expected generation profile for the next 12 months.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces an hourly generation forecast.

nodes.task_description: Simulate potential revenue under three different hedging strategies: 1) no hedging, 2) 50% fixed-price PPA, 3) 80% collar (cap and floor).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs simulations and provides a distribution of revenue outcomes for each strategy.

nodes.task_description: Compare the strategies based on expected revenue, risk (standard deviation), and worst-case outcome.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a summary table and a recommendation for the most suitable strategy.
